creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-07-01 21:26:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/squirrelmail-avelsieve-plugin Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                       pkg-plist 
    mail/squirrelmail-avelsieve-plugin/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Sieve Mail Filters for Squirrelmail (avelsieve) is a plugin for
  creating server-side filtering scripts on RFC 3028 compliant servers
  including Cyrus IMAP, DBMail, Dovecote and Exim 4.x.
  
  WWW: http://www.squirrelmail.org
  
  - Neil Darlow
  neil@darlow.co.uk
  
  PR:             ports/114173
  Submitted by:   Neil Darlow <neil at darlow.co.uk>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.853     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +82 -0     ports/mail/squirrelmail-avelsieve-plugin/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/squirrelmail-avelsieve-plugin/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/mail/squirrelmail-avelsieve-plugin/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/mail/squirrelmail-avelsieve-plugin/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +176 -0    ports/mail/squirrelmail-avelsieve-plugin/pkg-plist (new)
